query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "rethinking cross-layer information routing in diffusion transformers" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for defining and measuring "information flow" and "information paths" in computational systems, which is the core mechanism investigated in the user's question regarding cross-layer information routing in Diffusion Transformers. Additionally, it meets criterion (a) by providing a theoretical framework for the same biological/algorithmic mechanism (information routing) even though it uses a general graph-theoretic vocabula
